_meta.purpose: Date-bound splits for the Dukascopy-only pipeline. Walk-forward folds are generated from `research_train`; final OOS is `validation` then `holdout`. holdout is never tuned against — it is only revealed once per spec, by the certifier.
_meta.coverage_note: On-disk Dukascopy candles start 2020-07-01. The earlier 2008-2020 range is not currently fetched; if that data is later backfilled, widen `research_train.start` accordingly.
